description: Track annotated container image references embedded in TypeScript sources (e.g. Pulumi service definitions, where the image is a string literal Renovate's built-in managers don't parse). Each managed image is gated by an inline `// renovate: datasource=docker depName=<image>` comment on the line above, so only explicitly-annotated literals are touched — no heuristic scanning. Combined with `pinDigests`, the digest is pinned and refreshed; a semver tag also gets version updates.

customManagers.description: Annotated container image string literals in .ts files
